info.name: text-insert
info.text: To keep moving forward, we must keep our feet moving.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: To keep moving forward, we must keep our feet moving.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Sometimes we have to take a step backwards before we can advance forward.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: We have to be quick on our feet to avoid setbacks.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Discipline and coordination are key to success.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Sometimes we'll stumble over each other as we move forward together.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: We can succeed on our own, but we still have to make all the right moves.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Sometimes we'll have to move in opposite directions to complete our goal.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Handling a crisis with grace and elegance is sure to pay dividends.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: We'll keep our eyes open and step forward together.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: We'll keep our eyes open and step forward together.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: We must watch our step to avoid tumbling over each other.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: We can succeed alone or in a group, but we must be aware of our surroundings.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: We won't reach our objective if we stand still.
